message:
perf(stats,sqlite): move blocked-by computation to Rust, reduce allocations

- stats.rs: Replace expensive SQL double LEFT JOIN in
  get_blocked_by_blocks_deps_only() with lightweight single-table query
  via new get_blocks_dep_edges(), filtering by status (excluding
  Closed/Tombstone) entirely in Rust memory since issues are already loaded
- sqlite.rs: Add get_blocks_dep_edges() method — simple SELECT on
  dependencies table with no JOINs, returning raw (String, String) pairs
- sqlite.rs: Change placeholder construction from Vec<String> with
  "?".to_string() to Vec<&str> with "?" in two sites, avoiding heap
  allocations for static single-character strings
- sqlite.rs: Change dedupe_preserving_order() from HashSet<String> (clones
  every value) to HashSet<&str> (borrows), eliminating clone overhead
  for the dedup seen-set while still cloning only for output vec

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
